Calliope is typing... Calliope 3:53 PM Just add the c parameter to map colors: ax . scatter ( x , y , z , c = z , cmap = 'viridis' ) The viridis colormap will show lower z values in purple and higher values in yellow. security-architecture.h1: Security by Design Calliope was architected for security from day one.
security-architecture.sub: Every layer—from infrastructure to application to runtime—implements defense in depth. Defense in Depth Security isn’t a single control—it’s layers of protection that work together. Even if one layer is compromised, others prevent breach escalation. Network Is
security-architecture._body: SECURITY Security by Design Calliope was architected for security from day one. Every layer—from infrastructure to application to runtime—implements defense in depth. Defense in Depth Security isn’t a single control—it’s layers of protection that work together. Even if one layer is compromised, others prevent breach escalation. Network Isolation Every customer environment operates in isolated network segments. No shared networking between tenants. VPC-level separation with strict ingress/egress controls. Compute Isolation Workloads run in dedicated containers with resource limits and security contexts. No shared compute resources between customers. Namespace-level isolation enforced. Storage Isolation Customer data is encrypted and segregated. No shared storage volumes between tenants. Encryption keys are customer-specific where applicable. Identity & Access Role-based access control (RBAC) at every layer. SSO integration with your identity provider. Fine-grained permissions down to individual resources. Zero Trust Networking All internal communication is encrypted and authenticated. Service-to-service communication requires mutual TLS. No implicit trust based on network location. Immutable Infrastructure Infrastructure is defined as code and deployed via CI/CD. No manual changes to production systems. All changes are versioned, reviewed, and auditable. Security architecture that scales Get Started Talk to Security Team

security-data-protection._body: SECURITY Your Data Your data is encrypted, isolated, and under your control. We implement defense in depth to protect data throughout its lifecycle. Data is the Asset Your code, your queries, your analysis—this is what matters. Calliope treats your data as the critical asset it is. Encryption in Transit All data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.3. No exceptions. This includes browser connections, API calls, and internal service communication. Encryption at Rest All data at rest is encrypted using AES-256. This includes databases, file storage, backups, and logs. Encryption keys are managed securely. Customer Data Isolation Your data is logically and physically separated from other customers. No shared databases, no shared storage volumes, no data commingling. Secrets Management API keys, database credentials, and other secrets are stored in dedicated secrets management systems. Never in code, never in plain text, never in logs. Data Residency Options Need data to stay in a specific region? We offer deployment options that keep your data where your compliance requirements demand. Data Retention & Deletion You control your data lifecycle. Delete your data when you choose. We don’t retain customer data beyond what’s needed for service operation. Questions about data protection? about._body: CALLIOPE AI Built From Frustration. Calliope was born from a simple question: Why is it so hard to build smart AI workflows that actually work? Founder's story Calliope started the way a lot of real breakthroughs do — from painful experience. Calliope brings modular, dynamic chatflow design together with agentic planning, live retrieval pipelines, multi-model orchestration, and full observability. Our founder needed to run A/B tests across multiple AI models to figure out which approach would perform best for a live application. Simple idea, right? But the tooling landscape was a mess — fragmented, manual, slow, and brittle. Testing different prompts, models, data sources, and retrieval setups all at once? Practically impossible without endless duct-tape engineering. After spending way too long patching together custom scripts, ad-hoc pipelines, and fragile workflows just to run basic experiments, it became clear: There had to be a better, easier way. But there wasn’t. So we built it. Calliope exists because real AI development deserves real tools — not toys, not hacks, not hope. Structured, scalable, elegant — built by engineers who know what it feels like to wrestle with brittle systems and still want to ship something smarter. Why the name Calliope? Calliope was the muse of epic poetry — the force that helped creators turn ideas into stories that moved civilizations. We think great AI systems deserve the same. What We Believe: Intelligence without structure is chaos. Systems should help you build faster, not slow you down. Every good idea deserves a real shot at reality — not endless infrastructure duct-tape. Built by builders. For builders who refuse to settle. agents, retrieval, notebooks, model hosting, and more — into a structured, governable flow that gets real work done. Build Smarter Start with Calliope

developer-resources._body: DEVELOPER RESOURCES Build With Documentation, community, and support for builders on Calliope. Everything you need to get started and scale up. GET STARTED Resources for every stage of your journey. Whether you’re just getting started or scaling to production, we have resources to help. Documentation, tutorials, community support, and direct access to the team. Quick Links: Jump to what you need. Join Discord **Documentation** — Complete guides, API reference, and tutorials at [docs.calliope.ai](https://docs.calliope.ai) **Zentinelle SDK** — Govern any AI agent. Add policy enforcement, audit logging, and compliance to your own agents. **Discord Community** — Ask questions, share projects, get help from the community and team **GitHub** — Open source components, examples, and issue tracking **API Reference** — Complete API documentation for all Calliope services **Tutorials** — Step-by-step guides for common use cases Resources Documentation Complete documentation for The Hub, AI Lab, IDE, Chat Studio, Deep Agent, Langflow, Browser, and Zentinelle governance. Start at docs.calliope.ai Discord Community Join hundreds of builders using Calliope. Get help, share what you’re building, and connect with the team. Join Discord Enterprise Support Enterprise customers get dedicated support channels, SLAs, and direct access to engineering. Contact Sales for enterprise support options. Getting Started New to Calliope? Here’s the fastest path to getting started: Sign up at calliope.ai/signup — free tier available Read the quickstart in docs.calliope.ai Join Discord to ask questions and connect with the community Explore examples in our GitHub repositories Documentation Our documentation covers everything from getting started to advanced governance configuration: Platform Overview — Understanding The Hub and its components AI Lab Guide — Setting up notebooks, connecting data sources, building pipelines AI IDE Guide — Configuring Completions, Chat, and Agent modes Chat Studio Guid
